title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
